programs.title: Love, For Real
programs.desc: (2021) Rom-com with Chloe Bridges. Best friends Hayley and Bree go on a dating show to publicize her fashion brand. But with love, friendship and careers on the line it could all go wrong.

programs.title: Love By Accident
programs.desc: After breaking down on a road trip, a woman enlists the mechanic to be her fake boyfriend. Starring Henderson Wade (2020)

programs.title: Cupids on Beacon Street
programs.desc: (2021) Romance with Britt Irvin. Opposites attract as an unromantic copy editor house sits with a handsome self-help coach running romantically themed workshops.

programs.title: North to Home
programs.desc: (2022) Heartfelt family drama with Lyndsy Fonseca, Kimberley Sustad, Erica Durance and Barbara Niven. Will simmering secrets ruin the celebrations when three sisters reunite for their mum's birthday?

programs.title: A Wish Come True
programs.desc: (2015) Rom-com with Megan Park. On her 30th birthday, Lindsay is granted all her past wishes. When things go awry, she realises that happiness and Mr. Right were there along.

programs.title: Flip That Romance
programs.desc: Jules and Lance are rival house renovators with a history. So, when they buy properties next-door to each other, they embark on a wager. But will their fierce competitive spirit lead to love? (2019)
